zh.lifeSummary: 當St. Louis IX roi de France於1214年4月25日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯波千時，他的父親Louis VIII Roi de France26歲，母親Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia26歲。他於1234年5月27日與Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1258年登記服兵役。他去世於1270年8月25日在突尼西亞تونس享年56歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当St. Louis IX roi de France于1214年4月25日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯波千时，他的父亲Louis VIII Roi de France26岁，母亲Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia26岁。他于1234年5月27日与Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1258年登记服兵役。他去世于1270年8月25日在突尼西亚تونس享年56岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: St.
meanings: Cornish: A Cornish form of Just (Prouter Est, the priest of St. Just).

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When St. Louis IX roi de France was born on 25 April 1214, in Poissy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Louis VIII Roi de France, was 26 and his mother, Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia, was 26. He married Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia on 27 May 1234. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1258. He died on 25 August 1270, in Tunis, Tunisia, at the age of 56, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque St. Louis IX roi de France est né le 25 avril 1214, à Poissy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Louis VIII Roi de France, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia le 27 mai 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1258. Il est décédé le 25 août 1270, à Tunis, Tunisie, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als St. Louis IX roi de France am 25. April 1214 in Poissy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Louis VIII Roi de France 26 und seine Mutter Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia 26. Er hat am 27. Mai 1234 Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1258 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 25. August 1270 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Tunis, Tunesien und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando St. Louis IX roi de France è nato il il 25 aprile 1214 nel Poissy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Louis VIII Roi de France, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia il 27 maggio 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1258. Morì il 25 agosto 1270, nel Tunis, Tunisia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: St. Louis IX roi de Franceが1214年4月25日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスポイシで生まれた時，父Louis VIII Roi de Franceは26歳，母Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Franciaは26歳であった。1234年5月27日にMargarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Franciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年に兵役登録をした。彼は1270年8月25日にチュニジアتونسで56歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: St. Louis IX roi de France(이)가 1214년 4월 25일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 포이시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis VIII Roi de France(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1234년 5월 27일 Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1270년 8월 25일 튀니지 تونس에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

mn.25 April 1214–25 August 1270: 1214 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 25–1270 оны Наймдугаар сарын 25

pt.25 April 1214–25 August 1270: 25 de abril de 1214–25 de agosto de 1270
pt.lifeSummary: Quando St. Louis IX roi de France nasceu em 25 de abril de 1214, em Poissy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Louis VIII Roi de France, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia em 27 de maio de 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1258. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1270, em Tunis, Tunísia, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда St. Louis IX roi de France родился 25 апреля 1214 г. в местности поисси, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis VIII Roi de France было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia 27 мая 1234 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1258 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 25 августа 1270 г. в местности تونس, Тунис в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.25 April 1214–25 August 1270: 25 de abril de 1214–25 de agosto de 1270
es.lifeSummary: Cuando St. Louis IX roi de France nació el 25 de abril de 1214, en Poissy, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Louis VIII Roi de France, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia el 27 de mayo de 1234. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1258. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1270, en Tunis, Túnez, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
